'''âg-r-p-r''' ('''kagarperoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wander|wander]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wander|wander]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-r-p-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagarperoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
